Delhi revenue districts reorganised - The Federal
Delhi Government Reorganises Revenue Map - Oneindia

notes: Delhi was reorganized from 11 to 13 districts effective January 1, 2026. Three new districts were created: Old Delhi, Central North Delhi, and Outer North Delhi. The Shahdara district was dissolved and merged into other districts. Coordinates obtained from OpenStreetMap Nominatim API.
